title: Industrial Automation
description: Fanless industrial PCs, network appliances, and IoT platforms for factory automation, process control, semiconductor manufacturing, and quality inspection.

items.name: Industrial PCs & Fanless Industrial PCs
items.specs: Boxtype  Rackmount  Server  Desktop  Wallmount  Panel
items.detailDescription: KC certified, ISO 9001 compliant fanless PCs in box, rackmount, server, desktop, wallmount, and panel form factors for continuous 24/7 industrial operation.

items.name: Device Cloud & IoT  Wind River
items.specs: Helix Virtualization  Simics  Software Defined Infrastructure
items.alt: Wind River Device Cloud and IoT
items.detailDescription: Wind River IoT and device cloud solutions including Helix Virtualization Platform, Simics virtual platform, and Software Defined Infrastructure for industrial IoT.

items.name: RTOS  Wind River
items.detailDescription: Wind River real-time operating systems for industrial automation, including VxWorks, Wind River Linux, and ISaGRAF IEC 61131-3 control runtime.
